selling_points: Same-day appointments available for new patients in pain.
We verify your insurance before your first visit — no surprise bills.
Over 15 years serving Scranton. Most patients feel relief after their very first adjustment.

faq.first_visit: Your first visit includes a consultation, health history review, and examination. If you're a good candidate for care, we typically begin treatment the same day. Plan on about an hour.
faq.insurance_check: We accept most major plans — Blue Cross, Aetna, Cigna, Medicare, United Healthcare, and Geisinger. We verify your benefits before your visit so there are no surprises.
faq.conditions: We treat back pain, neck pain, headaches, sciatica, sports injuries, and auto accident injuries. We also see patients for general wellness and maintenance care.
faq.xray: Yes — digital X-ray is on site. We take them during your first visit if needed, at no extra charge.
faq.adjustment_time: Most adjustments take 10–15 minutes. First visits run about an hour with the full exam.
faq.pain: Adjustments are generally comfortable. Most patients are surprised by how good they feel right after. Mild soreness the next day is normal and fades quickly.
faq.accident: If you were in an auto accident, don't wait — injuries can worsen quickly. Most auto insurance covers chiropractic care. We can often get you in the same day.
faq.parking: Free parking lot directly behind the building off Mulberry St.

tone: professional, warm, and reassuring — patients are often in pain and anxious
greeting: Hi! Welcome to Lakewood Chiropractic 👋 Whether you're dealing with pain or just want to feel your best, we're here to help. What brings you in today?
after_hours_message: We're closed right now — but if you're in pain, don't wait. Leave me your name and number and we'll call you first thing when we open.
lead_captured_message: You're all set, {name}! Our front desk will call you shortly to confirm your appointment. We look forward to helping you feel better.
fallback_message: Happy to help — are you looking to book an appointment, ask about a condition, or check your insurance coverage?
